description: An advisor is conducting an annual review and needs to check if a client's portfolio allocation is aligned with their goals.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the client's current portfolio holdings and their target asset allocation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls the current holdings and the target (e.g., 70% equity, 30% fixed income).

nodes.task_description: Compare the current allocation to the target and identify any significant drift.

expected_outcome.value: Agent's analysis shows the portfolio has drifted to 75% equity due to market performance.

nodes.task_description: Present the findings to the advisor and suggest rebalancing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a summary of the allocation drift and recommends rebalancing trades.
